title: Sorting items in table widget
excerpt:
The table widget in dashboards has no sort capabilities.  What determines the order of ITEMS within a table WIDGET, in a DASHBOARD? 
Thanks

posts.author: lebmelvin (leb melvin)
posts.cookedHtml:
The table widget in dashboards has no sort capabilities. What determines the order of ITEMS within a table WIDGET, in a DASHBOARD?

Thanks

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to sort items in the table widget? If so, how?

If not PLEASE ADD THIS FEATURE.

posts.author: noamcohen (cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
persona

A engineering manager that is conducting dailies in a dashboard called “stand-dashboard”

need

I want to be able to see the items in the table sorted by timeline and “planned” status.

benefit

The discussion should be structured according to importance and commitment. Having this feature will reduce inefficiency (people will start talking from the first-to-last ticket) and I will avoid the mental burden of making sure that everyone are utilizing the daily time in an optimized manner.
